title: The X-Mark Promise
description: On pages 20, 21, 22, 23, this part focuses on the silent x-mark farewell. Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Silent X-Mark Farewell sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Drip, I'm not sure if you are

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is a grave act, your highness...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Rank is worn above one's clothing.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: and a resident of this land,

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: I'd like to express my gratitude.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yeah, I think that's a good idea.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Monkey D. Luffy Bounty: 100 Million Bell

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: There's no turning back now, Luffy!

summary: Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
